name: Coconut Bread#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt in a bowl.
2. In another large bowl, mix sugar, oil, eggs and coconut extract.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture with buttermilk, stirring until just combined.
4. Fold in shredded coconut and chopped walnuts.
5. Grease and flour two 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pans.
6. Pour batter into prepared pans.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour, or until breads are done when tested with a toothpick.
8. Allow to cool in pans for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
